title: KISS Claw Scenario Schema
description: Schema for defining test scenarios in the KISS-Claw orchestration framework

description.description: Human-readable description of what the scenario tests

request.description: The orchestrator request - what the user is asking for

expected_outputs.description: List of expected output files and their validation criteria

file.description: Path to the expected output file relative to scenario directory

content_match.description: Regex pattern that output file content must match

must_exist.description: Whether this file must exist in the output

is_executable.description: Whether this file must have executable permissions

golden_file.description: Path to golden reference file for exact matching

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for this scenario execution

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering scenarios

environment.description: Environment variables to set for scenario execution

setup.description: Setup actions before running the scenario

fixtures.description: Files or directories to create before test

scripts.description: Shell scripts to execute during setup
Shell scripts to execute during teardown
